# apcore-cli

> The CLI adapter for apcore — exposes apcore modules as high-performance, AI-perceivable command-line tools with schema-driven arguments and built-in safety gates.

apcore-cli turns registered apcore modules into structured CLI commands: it parses module schemas into arguments, discovers modules automatically, formats output, and enforces approval and security policies at the command boundary.

## Start Here

- [Home](https://apcore-cli.aiperceivable.com/): What apcore-cli does and how modules become command-line tools.
- [Getting Started](https://apcore-cli.aiperceivable.com/getting-started/): Install the CLI and run your first apcore module as a command.

## Features

- [Features Overview](https://apcore-cli.aiperceivable.com/features/overview/): Map of the dispatcher, parser, discovery, and security components.
- [Core Dispatcher](https://apcore-cli.aiperceivable.com/features/core-dispatcher/): Routes parsed commands to the apcore executor.
- [Schema Parser](https://apcore-cli.aiperceivable.com/features/schema-parser/): Converts module schemas into typed CLI arguments and options.
- [Discovery](https://apcore-cli.aiperceivable.com/features/discovery/): Automatically discovers available modules and exposes them as commands.
- [Approval Gate](https://apcore-cli.aiperceivable.com/features/approval-gate/): Requires confirmation for sensitive operations before execution.
- [Security Manager](https://apcore-cli.aiperceivable.com/features/security/): Enforces access and safety policies at the command boundary.
- [Shell Integration](https://apcore-cli.aiperceivable.com/features/shell-integration/): Completions and shell ergonomics for apcore commands.
- [Init Command](https://apcore-cli.aiperceivable.com/features/init-command/): Scaffolds CLI configuration for a project.
- [Exposure Filtering](https://apcore-cli.aiperceivable.com/features/exposure-filtering/): Controls which modules are surfaced as commands.

## Specifications

- [Project Manifest](https://apcore-cli.aiperceivable.com/project-apcore-cli/): Scope and manifest for the CLI adapter.
- [Software Requirements](https://apcore-cli.aiperceivable.com/srs/): Functional and non-functional requirements.
- [Technical Design](https://apcore-cli.aiperceivable.com/tech-design/): Architecture and component design of the CLI.

## Ecosystem

- [apcore](https://apcore.aiperceivable.com/): The core schema-enforced module standard exposed as commands.
- [apcore-mcp](https://apcore-mcp.aiperceivable.com/): MCP server & OpenAI tools bridge for apcore modules.
- [apcore-a2a](https://apcore-a2a.aiperceivable.com/): Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol adapter.

## Key Facts

- Exposes apcore modules as command-line tools.
- Schema-driven argument parsing with automatic module discovery.
- Built-in approval gate and security manager for safe execution.
- Part of the AI-Perceivable ecosystem alongside the MCP and A2A adapters.
- Open source. Source: https://github.com/aiperceivable/apcore-cli
